'''''Ewoks'' 6''' is the sixth issue of [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|Marvel's ''Ewoks'']] series of comic books and was published under the [[Marvel Comics]] [[Star Comics]] imprint on [[December 3]], 1985 with a cover date of [[March]] [[1986]]. This story is split into three chapters: "The Ice Demon," "The Icy Trap," and "The Touch of Doom."
